items.title: Focus shifts to tussle within AIADMK ahead of district secretaries’ meeting with EPS
items.summary: A cross-section of the party functionaries feels that Mr. Palaniswami should follow up on his statement calling on the dissidents to agree to talks with an appeal for reunification

items.title: Trump Warns Iran the ‘Clock Is Ticking’ as Tensions Surge Again in Middle East
items.summary: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.
